title: Israel carries out air strikes on Lebanon, state media says, as Iran claims deal with US near
summary_full: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister said a deal to end fighting with the US is close.
summary_public: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister said a deal to end fighting with the US is close.
